requirement: Phase 0.6: tenant context middleware, schema name updates, Kafka topic renames, observability tenant labels

tasks.title: Tenant context middleware + tests
tasks.description:
Implement the tenant context middleware in the shared library and write tests.

Read docs/platform-architecture.md section 4 (Tenant Context Propagation) for the design.

Create src/shared/internal/tenant/context.go:
- TenantID type (string alias)
- contextKey for storing tenant in context.Context
- WithTenant(ctx, tenantID) context.Context — stores tenant in context
- TenantFromContext(ctx) (TenantID, bool) — extracts tenant from context
- MustTenant(ctx) TenantID — panics if no tenant (for internal code that must have it)

Create src/shared/internal/tenant/middleware.go:
- TenantMiddleware(validTenants []string) func(http.Handler) http.Handler
- Extracts X-GarudaX-Tenant header from request
- If header missing: 401 {"error":{"code":"TENANT_REQUIRED","message":"X-GarudaX-Tenant header is required"}}
- If tenant not in validTenants list: 403 {"error":{"code":"UNKNOWN_TENANT","message":"tenant 'xxx' is not registered"}}
- If valid: store in context via WithTenant, call next handler
- For MVP: validTenants is a static list passed at startup (no DB lookup yet). Default: ["ace-commodities", "mse-equities"]
- Skip tenant check for health endpoints (/healthz, /readyz, /metrics)

Create src/shared/internal/tenant/middleware_test.go:
- TestTenantMiddleware_ValidTenant — header present with valid tenant → 200, tenant in context
- TestTenantMiddleware_MissingHeader — no header → 401
- TestTenantMiddleware_UnknownTenant — invalid tenant → 403
- TestTenantMiddleware_HealthBypass — /healthz without header → 200 (bypassed)
- TestTenantFromContext_Set — verify context round-trip
- TestTenantFromContext_NotSet — verify returns false
- TestMustTenant_Panics — verify panics when not set

Create src/shared/internal/tenant/observability.go:
- TenantLogger(ctx) *slog.Logger — returns logger with tenant_id attribute from context
- TenantMetricLabels(ctx) map[string]string — returns {"tenant_id": tenantID} for metrics

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/shared && go test ./internal/tenant/... -v -race

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Wire tenant middleware into gateway + update schema refs
tasks.description:
Wire the tenant middleware into the gateway and update SQL schema references across all services.

Part A — Wire into gateway (src/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go):
- Import shared tenant package
- Add TenantMiddleware to the middleware chain BEFORE auth middleware
- Pass validTenants list: []string{"ace-commodities", "mse-equities"}
- The middleware will reject any request without X-GarudaX-Tenant header (except health endpoints)

Part B — Update SQL schema references:
Find and replace old schema names with ace_* names in all Go source files. The V30 migration renames the DB schemas, so the code must match.

Specific files to update (grep for the old names):
- src/market-data-service/ — has references to market_data.* tables
- src/securities-service/ — has references to securities.* tables → change to ace_securities.*
- Any other service with SQL queries referencing old schema names

Use grep to find all references: grep -rn '"reference\.|"exchange\.|"clearing\.|"compliance\.|"warehouse\.|"market_data\.|"participants\.|"securities\.' src/ --include='*.go'

For each match, rename the schema prefix:
- reference. → ace_reference.
- participants. → ace_participants.
- exchange. → ace_exchange.
- clearing. → ace_clearing.
- compliance. → ace_compliance.
- warehouse. → ace_warehouse.
- market_data. → ace_market_data.
- securities. → ace_securities.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT rename 'auth.' — auth stays platform-level per directive §3.4.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && for svc in gateway market-data-service securities-service; do cd src/$svc && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../..; done

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Update Kafka topics + observability tenant labels
tasks.description:
Rename Kafka topics to {tenant_id}.{domain}.{event} convention and add tenant_id to observability.

Part A — Kafka topic renames:
Update topic constants in all services with kafka packages.

In src/market-data-service/internal/kafka/config.go, change:
- "ace.trades.executed" → "ace-commodities.trades.executed"
- "ace.clearing.novated" → "ace-commodities.clearing.novated"
- "ace.margin.call-issued" → "ace-commodities.margin.call-issued"
- "ace.settlement.completed" → "ace-commodities.settlement.completed"
- "ace.compliance.status-changed" → "ace-commodities.compliance.status-changed"
- "ace.market-data.trade-ingested" → "ace-commodities.market-data.trade-ingested"
- "ace.warehouse.receipt-pledged" → "ace-commodities.warehouse.receipt-pledged"
- "ace.warehouse.delivery-completed" → "ace-commodities.warehouse.delivery-completed"
- "ace.auth.user-registered" → "ace-commodities.auth.user-registered"
- DLQ: "ace.dlq." → "ace-commodities.dlq."

In src/securities-service/internal/kafka/topics.go, change:
- "securities.trade.executed" → "ace-commodities.securities.trade.executed"
- "securities.order.created" → "ace-commodities.securities.order.created"
- "securities.order.cancelled" → "ace-commodities.securities.order.cancelled"

Also check all other services under src/*/internal/kafka/ for topic constants and rename similarly.

Part B — Observability tenant labels:
Update src/shared/internal/observability/middleware.go:
- If tenant context is present in the request context (via TenantFromContext), add tenant_id label to metrics
- Update the MetricsMiddleware to include tenant_id in request counter and histogram keys

Update src/shared/internal/observability/tracing.go:
- If tenant context is present, add tenant_id to trace span attributes

Update src/shared/internal/observability/logger.go:
- Add a helper to create a logger with tenant_id attribute from context

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/shared && go test ./... && cd ../market-data-service && go test ./... && cd ../securities-service && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Verify all tests pass after retrofit
tasks.description:
Run the full test suite to verify Phase 0.6 retrofit changes don't break anything.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go — set PATH first.

1. cd src/shared && go test ./... -race -cover — verify tenant middleware + observability tests
2. cd src/gateway && go test ./... — verify gateway compiles and tests pass with tenant middleware
3. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover — verify schema renames + kafka topics
4. cd src/market-data-service && go test ./... — verify kafka topic renames
5. For each remaining service: cd src/$svc && go build ./... (verify compilation)
6. cd src/admin-ui && npm test -- --run — verify frontend still passes
7. Verify: grep for old schema names in Go files — should find 0 matches (except auth.)
8. Verify: grep for old topic names — should find 0 matches

Report pass/fail per service.

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
